overrides.out_of_state_controlled_text: Out-of-state prescribers must have an active DEA and Texas DPS registration for controlled substances.
overrides.schedule_ii_transfer_text: CII prescriptions must be electronic. Paper CII cannot be transferred.
overrides.schedule_iii_v_transfer_text: Permitted with up to 5 refills over 6 months per federal rules.
overrides.e_rx_scope_text: Electronic prescribing is required for all controlled substances in Texas.
overrides.telehealth_controlled_text: Requires an established practitioner-patient relationship before prescribing controlled substances via telehealth.
overrides.special_restrictions: Must search PMP before prescribing or dispensing.

access_facts.telehealth_services_available: Limited initial controlled substance prescribing via telehealth.
access_facts.notes: Strict DPS registration requirements complicate out-of-state access.

rules.rule_text: Electronic prescribing is required for all controlled substances in Texas.

restrictions.description: Prescriber must be registered with Texas DPS to prescribe controlled substances.

segment_data.key_friction: Texas DPS registration required for out-of-state prescribers.

items.guidance_text: Ensure your prescriber has active Texas DPS credentials before your assignment starts.

claims.claim_text: Texas mandates electronic prescribing for all controlled substances.
